qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Broken Object Level Authorization on sync file operations allows any authenticated user to access, modify, or delete any other user's budget files
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets authenticated /sync file-object authorization checks in packages/sync-server/src/app-sync.ts, while the advisory targets missing authentication middleware on /simplefin/* and /pluggyai/* bank-sync endpoints in app-simplefin.js and app-pluggyai.js.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described missing authentication on the SimpleFIN and Pluggy.ai bank sync endpoints. The only final qualifying finding is a separate authenticated BOLA issue in sync file operations. The session's bank-endpoint report describes the advisory root cause, but it is marked non_qualifying_vuln and is outside the finding scope for target matching.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-m2cq-xjgm-f668 describes missing validateSessionMiddleware on POST /simplefin/status, /simplefin/accounts, /simplefin/transactions, /pluggyai/status, /pluggyai/accounts, and /pluggyai/transactions.

sync_file_bola/vulnerability_report.json describes authenticated user control of fileId on /sync/download-user-file, /sync/upload-user-file, /sync/user-get-key, /sync/user-create-key, /sync/reset-user-file, /sync/update-user-filename, and /sync/get-user-file-info.
.judge/input_manifest.json lists sync_file_bola as the only final finding with status qualifying_vuln.
